name: Integration - LLM Failure and Fallback
description: Simulates LLM failure in LLMService.generate_code and verifies that AgentOrchestrator returns a fallback response after retries.
input: Mock LLMService.generate_code to raise Exception; call AgentOrchestrator.process_request('Write a Python function to multiply two numbers.', 'code')
output: Dict with success=False, fallback and error fields populated
